repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.data-engineering: Airflow-orchestrated ETL pipeline, batch vs Kafka streaming, idempotent partitioned writes, schema evolution, backfill, and data lineage tracking
build a React dashboard component with client-side state

retrieval_query: etl elt data pipeline kafka spark airflow dagster data warehouse partition backfill idempotent schema evolution data lineage batch stream orchestration

validation_smoke.name: code.data-engineering L3 validation smoke
signals: rerunning a pipeline run produces identical output (idempotent)
backfill partition matches a forward-run partition
schema change is additive and downstream consumers still parse
row counts reconcile between source and target
lineage graph resolves every target column to a source

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.data-engineering diagnosis smoke
signals: a new source column breaks the loader
backfill overwrites a partition with partial data
streaming consumer reprocesses on rebalance without dedup
full-table reload instead of partition-scoped write
